findings.finding: Document addresses the falsifiability condition: This design is wrong if ordinary session shutdown on a feature branch still rewrites tracked `.pi/memory/facts.jsonl` without an explicit export/reconcile boundary.

Document addresses the falsifiability condition: This design is wrong if a fresh clone or branch switch no longer receives durable knowledge because startup import from tracked transport was removed or made optional by default.

Document addresses the falsifiability condition: This design is wrong if release/readiness checks still treat incidental `.pi/memory/facts.jsonl` drift as equivalent to missing `docs/` or `openspec/` lifecycle artifacts.
